description: Multi-seed re-run of E04 algorithm comparison: extends single-seed E04 (seed=42) to 10 independent seeds for statistical reliability. Provides per-seed mean reduction, std, bootstrap CIs, and seed-effect ANOVA. Directory contains the raw per-trial data (e29_multi_seed_e04_full.csv, 800 rows) and aggregated statistics (e29_multi_seed_statistics.csv, 44 rows).
notes: git_commit backfilled from the run's own provenance sidecar (archived at _agent_work/orphan_outputs/metadata.json).
derived/ holds e29_multi_seed_statistics.csv (per-optimizer aggregate with bootstrap CIs) produced by experiments/multi_seed_e04.py.

source_file pointed into experiments/outputs/, which held uncurated run outputs; the file was archived to _agent_work/orphan_outputs/ during wave-1 data-integrity cleanup. The canonical dataset is the CSV in this directory.
